title: Bulbophyllum maximum
taxonomy: Bulbophyllum maximum is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which consists of approximately 30,000 known orchid species. This plant belongs to the genus Bulbophyllum, a group of orchids characterized by their unique flowers and growth habits. The species Bulbophyllum maximum is further categorized into the subfamily Epidendroideae, which includes many tropical orchids. The subfamily Epidendroideae is itself part of the order Asparagales, a group of flowering plants that also includes asparagus and lilies.
